description:
Store has duplicate clause patterns for complete and requeue:
- complete: lines 383-410 (item_key != nil) and 413-436 (item_key == nil) 
- requeue: lines 448-462 (item_key != nil) and 464-491 (item_key == nil)

Both pairs do the same thing - just fetch item_key from stored lease if not provided.
Consolidate each to single clause using: item_key = lease.item_key || stored_lease.item_key

~50 lines reduction.
title: Consolidate Store complete/requeue dual clauses
